module-checks.check-1: Admin assignment list returns redacted fields by default.
module-checks.check-2: Reissue and revoke require admin role and emit audit events.
module-checks.check-3: Frontend-admin build passes with confirmation-safe operations.

scenarios.scenario-1: Admin can inspect bridge health and assignment status.
scenarios.scenario-2: Admin can reissue one user's proxy after explicit confirmation.
scenarios.scenario-3: Admin can revoke MTProto access without canceling VPN subscription.
scenarios.scenario-4: Non-admin and missing confirmation paths are rejected.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Admin logs and audit records never include full tg://proxy links or raw secrets.
